name: Jesan Rilian
bio:
Physical Appearance: Imperial male. Wears chainmail greaves, gauntlets, and boots with a Kvatch cuirass and guard helmet. Armed with a steel longsword and steel bow with arrows.
Race: Imperial
Personality Keywords: defender, brave, stalwart, protective, skilled
Role: A soldier serving in the Kvatch Guard, one of the few defenders who survived the initial Daedric assault on the city. He holds the barricade outside Kvatch alongside other survivors and will assist in rescuing trapped citizens and liberating the city from the Daedra. He possesses exceptional skill with a bow, his marksmanship enhanced by constant training or natural talent.
Home Location Information: Originally stationed at Kvatch. Found defending the barricade outside the besieged city during the Daedric invasion.
Combat Style: Jesan excels at ranged combat with his steel bow, possessing extraordinary marksmanship ability. When enemies close the distance, he transitions to his steel longsword for melee combat. His skill with the bow makes him a valuable asset during the defense and liberation of Kvatch.
Personality - The Barricade Defender: Jesan Rilian is one of the brave few who held the line when Kvatch fell to Daedra. While many died or fled, he remained at the barricade, defending the survivors and preparing to retake the city. His exceptional archery skills make him a deadly defender, able to strike down Daedra from range before they can reach the makeshift fortifications. He is ready to fight alongside any who would help liberate Kvatch, a soldier who has faced hell itself and still stands ready for battle.
author: Bethesda
